positive: A vibrant, stylized depiction of a celestial fox (kitsune) wearing a woven celestial sash, surrounded by constellations and glowing flora. The fox has elegant, flowing lines, stylized like Art Nouveau etchings, rendered in deep midnight blues, ethereal golds, and pops of bioluminescent teal. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, featuring strong, clean silhouettes of the fox and surrounding celestial elements. Use sharp contrast and high detail, suitable for a screen print on apparel. Intricate linework, decorative symmetry, cosmic watercolor wash background, vector style, detailed etching illustration.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, celebrity, grainy, out of focus
